english translation text: Ziyarat of Imam Redha (AS)

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s friend.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s argument.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلأَرْضِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s light in the darkness of the earth.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَمُودَ ٱلدِّينِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O pillar of the religion.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the choice of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the intimate friend of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِسْمَاعيلَ ذَبيحِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Ishmael the slain for the sake of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the messenger of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful

arabic text: عَلِيٍّ وَلِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: `Ali the authority of Allah

arabic text: وَوَصِيِّ رَسُولِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text: and the successor of the Messenger of the Lord of the worlds.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Fatimah the luminous lady.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of al-Hasan and al-Husayn

arabic text: سَيِّدَيْ شَبَابِ أَهْلِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ
english translation text: the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَليِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ زَيْنِ ٱلْعَابِدِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of `Ali the son of al-Husayn the adornment of the worshippers.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the son of `Ali

arabic text: بَاقِرِ عِلْمِ ٱلأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
english translation text: the splitter of the knowledge of the past and the last generations.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Ja`far the son of Muhammad

arabic text: ٱلصَّادِقِ ٱلْبَارِّ
english translation text: the veracious and dutiful.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Musa the son of Ja`far.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلصِّدِّيقُ ٱلشَّهِيدُ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O ever-truthful and martyr.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْوَصِيُّ ٱلْبَارُّ ٱلتَّقِيُّ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O dutiful and pious successor.

arabic text: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ أَقَمْتَ ٱلصَّلاَةَ
english translation text: I bear witness that you performed the prayers,

arabic text: وَآتَيْتَ ٱلزَّكَاةَ
english translation text: defrayed the poor-rate (and alms),

arabic text: وَأَمَرْتَ بِٱلْمَعْرُوفِ
english translation text: enjoined the right,

arabic text: وَنَهَيْتَ عَنِ ٱلْمُنْكَرِ
english translation text: forbade the wrong,

arabic text: وَعَبَدْتَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
english translation text: and serve Allah sincerely until death came upon you.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا ٱلْحَسَنِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O Abu’l-Hasan.

arabic text: وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
english translation text: Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
